item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "jq -r '
  \"schema_version: \\(.schema_version | type) = \\(.schema_version)\",
  \"mode: \\(.mode | type) = \\(.mode)\",
  \"max_parallel: \\(.max_parallel | type) = \\(.max_parallel)\",
  \"owner: \\(.owner | type) = \\(.owner)\",
  \"queues: \\(.queues | type) = \\(.queues | @json)\",
  \"queue[0]: \\(.queues[0] | type) = \\(.queues[0])\",
  \"queue[1]: \\(.queues[1] | type) = \\(.queues[1])\"
' longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json
jq -e '.queues == [\"new\", \"retry\"]' longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json >/dev/null
printf 'queue_order: PASS (new -> retry)\\n'"
